Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Luminian Knights]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — The Luminian Knights swear to place the lives of innocents above their own.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — The Luminian Knights act as representatives of the Unknown God.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — The Luminian Knights show no mercy or compassion to the Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — The Luminian Knights bring death to the servants of the void.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 11''' — The armor of Luminian knights is legendary due to its centuries of Intent.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Luminian Knights are men and women in silver armor decorated with the White Sun.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — A Luminian knight is worth two or three of the Guard in combat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Luminian knights are on patrol.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
